metadata.title: Strange New Worlds
metadata.description: Help see how your vault is interconnected with visual indicators.

regex.source: Notice(`File not found: ${l}. It may be a broken link.`)
regex.target: Notice(`未发现文件: ${l} 这有可能是个失效链接`)

regex.source: name:"Toggle active state of SNW plugin on/off"
text:"(requires reopening documents to take effect)"
regex.target: text:"(需要重新打开文档才能生效)"

regex.source: .setName("On the desktop enable SNW at startup")
.setName("On mobile devices enable SNW at startup")

regex.target: .setName("显示计数器所需的最小计数")

regex.source: .setName("Use Obsidian's Excluded Files list (Settings > Files & Links)")
regex.target: .setName("使用Obsidian的文件排除名单 (Settings > Files & Links)")

regex.source: .setName("Show SNW indicators in Live Preview Editor")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览编辑器中显示SNW标志")

regex.source: .setName("Embed references in Gutter in Live Preview Mode (Desktop)")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中的侧槽嵌入引文 (桌面端) ")

regex.source: .setName("Embed references in Gutter in Live Preview Mode (Mobile)")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中的侧槽嵌入引文 (移动端)")
.setName("在阅读视图中启用引文类型")

regex.source: .setName("Enable reference types in Live Preview Mode")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中启用引文类型")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`If enabled, SNW will only activate when the modifier key is pressed when hovering the mouse over an SNW counter.  
						Otherwise, SNW will activate on a mouse hover. May require reopening open files to take effect.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果启用，则当将鼠标悬停在SNW计数器上并按下快捷键时，SNW才会激活。   
						否则，SNW将在鼠标悬停时激活。 可能需要重新打开文件才能生效。 `)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`This setting defines how many references there needs to be for the reference count box to appear. May require reloading open files.
				 Currently set to: ${this.plugin.settings.minimumRefCountThreshold} references.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`此设置定义了需要多少引用才能显示引用计数框。 可能需要重新加载打开的文件。 
				 当前设置为: ${this.plugin.settings.minimumRefCountThreshold} 引文。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`This setting defines the max amount of files with their references are displayed in the popup or sidebar.  Set to 1000 for no maximum.
				 Currently set to: ${this.plugin.settings.maxFileCountToDisplay} references. Keep in mind higher numbers can affect performance on larger vaults.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`此设置定义了在弹出窗口或侧边栏中显示的文件及其引用的最大数量。 如果没有最大值，设置为1000。 
				 当前设置为: ${this.plugin.settings.maxFileCountToDisplay} 引文。请记住，较大的数字可能会影响较大vault的性能。 `)

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, links FROM files in the excluded folder will not be included in SNW's reference counters. May require restarting Obsidian.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则来自被排除文件夹中的文件的链接将不包括在SNW的引用计数器中。 可能需要重启Obsidian。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, links TO files in the excluded folder will not be included in SNW's reference counters.  May require restarting Obsidian.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则指向被排除文件夹中的文件的链接将不包括在SNW的引用计数器中。 可能需要重启Obsidian。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("In header of a document, show number of incoming link to that file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文档的标题中，显示到该文件的传入链接的数量。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("While using Live Preview, Display inline of the text of documents all reference counts for links, blocks and embeds.Note: files may need to be closed and reopened for this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在使用实时预览时，显示文档文本的内联，链接，块和嵌入的所有引用计数。 注意：要使此设置生效，可能需要关闭并重新打开文件。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("While in Reading View of a document, display inline of the text of documents all reference counts for links, blocks and embeds.Note: files may need to be closed and reopened for this setting to take effect.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文档的阅读视图中，显示文档文本的内联，链接，块和嵌入的所有引用计数。 注意：要使此设置生效，可能需要关闭并重新打开文件。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("This is off by default on mobile since the gutter takes up some space in the left margin.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这在手机上默认是关闭的，因为侧槽占据了左边的一些空间。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies block ID's, for example text blocks that end with a ^ and unique ID for that text block.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识块ID，例如以^结尾的文本块和该文本块的唯一ID。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies embedded links, that is links that start with an explanation mark. For example: ![[PageName]].")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识嵌入的链接，即以解释标记开头的链接。 例如 : ![[PageName]].")

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies links in a document. For example: [[PageName]].")
.setDesc("Identifies headers, that is lines of text that start with a hash mark or multiple hash marks. For example: # Heading 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识标题，即以一个或多个hash标记开头的文本行。 例如：# Heading 1. ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Displays properties from referenced files in the references list. The list is comma separated list of case-sensitive property names.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示引用列表中引用文件的属性。 该列表是一个逗号分隔的区分大小写的属性名称列表。 ")
